gaps.description: ARCHITECTURE.md does not exist — no formal architecture document; analysis based on PRD and source code
OPFSBackend.stat() always returns isDirectory: false — cannot detect directories, inconsistent with NodeFsBackend
OPFSBackend.delete() has no error handling — throws if path not found, unlike AgenticStoreBackend/NodeFsBackend which silently no-op
OPFSBackend.walkDir() throws on error instead of continuing — PRD requires improved error handling
AgenticStoreBackend.stat() returns mtime: Date.now() — not real mtime, inconsistent with NodeFsBackend
OPFSBackend missing empty-path validation present in AgenticStoreBackend and NodeFsBackend
No cross-backend consistency tests — PRD requires all backends pass the same test suite
StorageBackend interface fully implemented across AgenticStore, OPFS, NodeFs, Memory, LocalStorage, and SQLite backends
AgenticFileSystem implements readOnly mode, permission system, grep (literal + semantic), ls, tree, and AI tool definitions
Error types (NotFoundError, PermissionDeniedError, IOError) defined and used consistently
